title: SR 16-8: Supervisory Letter SR 16-8 on Off-site Review of Loan Files -- April 19, 2016
title_normalized: Supervisory Letter SR 16-8 on Off-site Review of Loan Files -- April 19, 2016
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Supervision and Regulation > SR Letters > SR 16-8
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: to Community Banking Organizations:  This letter applies to all state member banks and U.S. branches and agencies of foreign banking organizations with less than $50 billion in total assets.
section_headings: TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK
bm25_text: SR 16-8 Supervisory Letter SR 16-8 on Off-site Review of Loan Files -- April 19, 2016 to Community Banking Organizations:  This letter applies to all state member banks and U.S. branches and agencies of foreign banking organizations with less than $50 billion in total assets. BOARD OF GOVERNORS OF THE FEDERAL RESERVE SYSTEM WASHINGTON, D.C. 20551 DIVISION OF BANKING SUPERVISION AND REGULATION TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK SUBJECT:
